idea-plugin.name: YunYou Command Tool
idea-plugin.description:
Command Tool plugin for IntelliJ IDEA. Provides a tree-style goal list in a tool window — double-click to execute Maven, Gradle, PowerShell, Shell or Cmd commands with real-time log output in the Run Content Executor.

Features:
  • Categorized command tree with Module Packaging, Script Execution
  • Custom command management (add, edit, delete, reorder, favorites)
  • Spring Boot module auto-discovery for packaging
  • Built-in deployment & code-generation scripts with parameter dialogs
  • Extra command-line parameters support
  • Sync module packaging targets as Maven Run Configurations
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Tree-style command browser with categorized Maven goals
  • Spring Boot module auto-detection for packaging
  • Built-in PowerShell scripts for deployment and code generation
  • Custom command management with group organization
  • Real-time execution log with rerun and stop controls
